metaTitle: Careers at Carelabs Spain | Join Our Expert Team
metaDescription: Explore career opportunities at Carelabs Spain. Join a leading team specializing in power system analysis, arc flash studies.
h2: Want to make a difference? You have come to the right place.

Carelabs isn’t another corporate job. We have an open culture with people mindfully driven by honesty, hard work, fun and creativity! Our small team feels like a second family driven by our mission and because we are growing electrical engineering solutions company, your contributions at Carelabs will have a high impact on the business, offering you higher work satisfaction. Personal learning and growth is also a key ingredient to Carelabs culture and we achieve this by having regular 1-on-1 meetings between all managers and their direct reportees. If you’re a passionate, hardworking person wanting to make a big impact in their workplace, then we’d be delighted to work with you check out some of our open positions. Carelabs provides equal work opportunities to all team members and applicants and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, identity or expression, or other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local laws

A recruitment strategy is developed based on the requirements of the business plan in conjunction with the operational needs of the organization. Recruitment and selection of our vacant positions are done efficiently, non-discriminatory and system
What do you want to do?
paragraphs: Current openings can be found and applied on our website and all related social medias of carelabs. You can also submit your CV to [email protected]

The selection criteria are purely based on the skills and experience and Pre-assessments results of the candidate which is required as per the positions. Until onboard process carelabs follow digital medium for recruitment flow.
we always conduct reference checks to verify information about candidates’ work performance, academic performance and professional characteristics

The Candidates qualified all the selection criteria based on the positions, HR Department prepares and issues the Offer letter to the candidates digitally. After the candidate accepts the offer, further proceedings are carried out towards satisfying the statutory requirements.

On boarding process starts from induction for all our new employees within their first week of employment. It is a combination of general information about the Company as well as specifics regarding the employee’s job role
No. You can't apply for multiple positions.
Yes. If your skills match our job requirements, we will consider you.
You will get E-mail notification if your application is successful.
